summary: Complete testing of Scroll to Top and Account Deletion features. All backend tests (6/6) passed. Frontend UI for both Customer and Producer account deletion working correctly.
passed_tests: Scroll to Top: Navigation from Home to Products scrolls to top (position 0)
Scroll to Top: Navigation from Products to Cart scrolls to top (position 0)
Backend: DELETE /api/account/delete requires authentication (401)
Backend: DELETE /api/account/delete requires uppercase DELETE confirmation
Backend: DELETE /api/account/delete requires correct password
Backend: DELETE /api/account/delete endpoint exists and validates input
Backend: Producer account deletion validates password
Backend: Full account deletion flow (create user, login, delete, verify cannot login)
Customer UI: Profile page has Account tab (5th tab)
Customer UI: Account tab shows Data & Privacy and Danger Zone sections
Customer UI: Delete Account button opens modal with data-testid='delete-account-btn'
Customer UI: Delete modal has password input with data-testid='delete-password-input'
Customer UI: Delete modal has DELETE confirmation input with data-testid='delete-confirmation-input'
Customer UI: Delete Forever button disabled until form filled
Customer UI: Delete Forever button enabled after filling password and DELETE
Producer UI: Profile page has Account tab (3rd tab) with data-testid='tab-account'
Producer UI: Account tab shows Danger Zone with pending orders warning
Producer UI: Delete Account button opens modal with data-testid='delete-account-btn'
Producer UI: Delete modal has password and confirmation inputs
Producer UI: Delete Forever button disabled until form filled
critical_code_review_comments: ScrollToTop component correctly implemented using useLocation hook and useEffect
Account deletion endpoint properly validates password and DELETE confirmation
Customer deletion anonymizes orders and reviews instead of deleting (GDPR compliant)
Producer deletion checks for pending orders before allowing deletion
All data-testid attributes properly set for automated testing
Delete modal has proper disabled state management for the confirm button
seed_data_creation: Test user created and deleted during testing (test_delete_xxx@example.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scroll to Top and Account Deletion features fully tested. ScrollToTop component in /app/frontend/src/components/ScrollToTop.js works correctly on page navigation. Account deletion endpoint DELETE /api/account/delete at line 5429 in server.py requires password and DELETE confirmation. Customer Profile has Account tab (5th tab) with delete functionality. Producer Profile has Account tab (3rd tab) with delete functionality. All data-testid attributes are in place for automated testing.

scroll_to_top.details: ScrollToTop component correctly scrolls window to (0,0) on pathname change. Tested navigation from Home -> Products -> Cart, all scroll to top.

customer_account_deletion.details: Account tab visible in Customer Profile. Delete button opens modal. Modal requires password and DELETE confirmation. Button disabled until form filled. Backend validates and deletes account.

producer_account_deletion.details: Account tab visible in Producer Profile. Delete button opens modal. Modal shows warning about pending orders. Backend checks for pending orders before deletion.

backend_api.details: DELETE /api/account/delete endpoint validates auth, password, and DELETE confirmation. Returns 400 for invalid input, 200 on success.

screenshots: .screenshots/customer_account_tab.png - Customer Account tab with Danger Zone
.screenshots/customer_delete_modal_filled.png - Customer delete modal with form filled
.screenshots/producer_account_tab.png - Producer Account tab with Danger Zone
.screenshots/producer_delete_modal_filled.png - Producer delete modal with form filled
